creator: editor@callfortesting.org
text:
Here's an easy doc contributor one:

The ctfmerge(1) and related manual pages to not mention what a CTF is.

CTF is probably the Compact C Type Format, but that should be verified.

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=ctfmerge&apropos=0&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-RELEASE&arch=default&format=html
